title: Too Many DVDs
wikitext:
[]: Too Many DVDs?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri May 30, 2008 4:03 pm I've been a fan of Eva for a little over 2 years now. And compared to the older members on this board (older as is fans of Eva since its apparent premiere in '95) I've only had to buy the Eva TV Series on DVD just once. I've heard and seen the history of Eva TV Series release on home video. i've never actually seen the quality of the original DVD releases of Eva but I've read some stories. I've been spoiled with the Platinum Collection Thinpack. Alas, I just got a nice buttload of cash from Tax Returns and lo and beyond, instead of being smart and saving my cash I'm browsing Amazon. There's very few good DVD releases upcoming this summer (Persepolis and Batman:Gotham Knight are the only ones sparking some interest) so I've glanced at this ADV Platinum:Perfect Collection. It's a nice looking box, and I'm sure the packaging of the films themselves is SEXY. BUT....is it worth it? Does it have any extras worth the effort? Commentaries by people who matter? And no, Tiffany Grant is not a person who matters. Storyboards? Is it a worthy purchase? Or am I just getting antsy because I'm a diehard Eva Fan and I'm being suckered into a new ADV/Gainax scheme to get rich quick. Hell...I've already spent over $50 on buying Eva 1.0 and I know whenever it hits Region 01 DVD I'll buy it a second time. ...And there's three more films to go. P.S. Did that 2nd release of Eva 1.0 on DVD have anything interesting on it? Or was it just the film and Shinji's ass on the cover?

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Fri May 30, 2008 5:06 pm I think you should save your money for Rebuild. I don't think the new fancy 'box' has anything new to offer that you don't already have. EDIT: Actually, I find this to be an odd spot for this. It might be better in 'Everything Else Evangelion'.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 08, 2008 10:59 am Platinum comes with the Storyboards for several of the episodes (there's some other thread about such), but from what I understand, the boxset of Platinum only has those crappy ADV staff related extras. (eg: At least the single volumes of Platinum comes with those sometimes-incorrect-facts Renewal booklets, but the boxset doesn't have those, apparently. I have the single volumes. )

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Jun 08, 2008 11:41 am Here's a vid of the platinum box: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0dpt9S9vWT0 EDIT: Found another one but It looks very different. Could someone fill me in on this? http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QMqJT9Bb56I

[]:             Quote Post by r3zn0r » Mon Jun 16, 2008 4:50 am Indigo Arcangel wrote: EDIT: Found another one but It looks very different. Could someone fill me in on this? http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QMqJT9Bb56I

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion__x » Thu Jun 26, 2008 6:45 am I have the Platinum set. I find it great.
